stories.headline: Adobe Replaces Experience Cloud With CX Enterprise, Going All-In on AI Agents
stories.key_takeaway: Adobe retired its Experience Cloud brand and launched CX Enterprise, an agentic AI platform with 10+ production agents, open MCP/A2A interoperability, and a credit-based pricing model.

pull_quote.text: By synthesizing intelligence from across Adobe applications, enterprise systems, and leading AI platforms, we are closing the gap between insight and action, enabling brands to deliver one-to-one personalized experiences at scale.

stories.article_excerpt: Adobe just retired one of the most recognized brands in enterprise marketing software. At its annual Summit in Las Vegas on April 20, the

stories.headline: Meta Partners With AWS to Deploy Tens of Millions of Graviton Cores for Agentic AI
stories.key_takeaway: Meta is deploying tens of millions of AWS Graviton5 CPU cores in a multibillion-dollar, three-year deal that signals agentic AI workloads are driving a shift from GPU-only to heterogeneous compute.

pull_quote.text: AWS has been a trusted cloud partner for years, and expanding to Graviton allows us to run the CPU-intensive workloads behind agentic AI with the performance and efficiency we need at our scale.

stories.article_excerpt: Meta Platforms has signed a multibillion-dollar agreement with Amazon Web Services to deploy tens of millions of Graviton processor cores, mak

stories.headline: Anthropic Project Deal Sees Claude Agents Negotiate 186 Deals in Workplace Experiment
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic built an internal marketplace where Claude agents autonomously negotiated real deals, revealing that more capable models get systematically better outcomes while disadvantaged users remain unaware.

pull_quote.text: People on the losing end might not realize they are worse off.

data_points.label: Extra earnings per item for Opus vs Haiku
Participants willing to pay for AI negotiation

stories.headline: Era Raises $11 Million to Build Software Platform for AI Hardware Gadgets
stories.key_takeaway: Era Computer is betting the AI hardware sector needs a shared software infrastructure layer and has raised $11M to build middleware that lets any hardware maker add AI intelligence.

pull_quote.text: What we really believe is that the future of tech should not be made by people in San Francisco.

stories.article_excerpt: The first wave of standalone AI gadgets crashed and burned. Era Computer thinks the problem was never the hardware -- it was the missing s

stories.headline: OpenAI Extends Responses API With Shell Tool, Agent Loop, and Hosted Workspaces
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI is collapsing the agent infrastructure stack into a single API surface by adding hosted shell execution, an automatic agent loop, and a reusable skills framework.

pull_quote.text: The Responses API is the foundation of our next chapter of building agents.

data_points.label: Tool calls in single compacted session

stories.article_excerpt: OpenAI is turning its Responses API into a full-blown agent runtime. In a series of updates rolled out since February 2026 and expande

stories.headline: LLM Inference Pricing Drops 50 Percent as April Model Avalanche Reshapes Market
stories.key_takeaway: Five major LLM releases in nine days drove good-enough inference costs down 50 percent versus January, with open-weight Chinese models pricing frontier-adjacent quality at one-sixth the cost.

pull_quote.text: Five major model releases in nine days is unprecedented. The combined capability ceiling rose faster than any comparable period since GPT-4.

stories.article_excerpt: Five major model releases in nine days. A 50 percent drop in the cost of good-enough inference since January. And a pricing flo

stories.headline: GPT-5.4 and Gemini 3.1 Pro Tie for Top Spot on Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index
stories.key_takeaway: GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and Claude Opus 4.7 are tied at 57 on the Intelligence Index, but each wins in different domains, signaling the frontier has become a plateau where workload fit matters more.

pull_quote.text: These are within noise more than these three are tied at the top.

data_points.label: Gemini vs GPT-5.4 on GPQA Diamond

stories.headline: OpenAI Ships Images 2.0 With Accurate Text Rendering, Fixing AIs Spelling Problem
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI Images 2.0 achieves ~99% character-level text accuracy across multiple scripts, eliminating the most visible barrier to commercial adoption of AI imagery.

pull_quote.text: The text rendering upgrade is the most practically significant improvement for anyone building real applications.

stories.article_excerpt: For as long as AI image generation has existed, it has had one embarrassing tell: it cannot spell. On April 21, OpenAI released Ch

stories.headline: Cambridge Creates Brain-Like Memristor That Could Slash AI Energy Use by 70 Percent
stories.key_takeaway: Cambridge researchers engineered a modified hafnium oxide memristor with switching currents a million times lower than conventional devices, potentially cutting AI hardware energy use by 70 percent.

pull_quote.text: I spent almost three years on this. There were a huge number of failures. But at the end of November, we saw the first really good results.
pull_quote.role: Lead author, Cambridge Dept of Materials Science

stories.article_excerpt: University of Cambridge researchers have engineered a new type of nanoelectronic device that mimics the human brains ability to process

stories.headline: Apple Unveils MANZANO, a Unified Multimodal Model With Hybrid Vision Tokenizer at ICLR
stories.key_takeaway: MANZANO uses a single shared encoder with two lightweight adapters to unify image understanding and generation, achieving state-of-the-art among unified multimodal models from 300M to 30B parameters.

pull_quote.text: Manzano handles counterintuitive, physics-defying prompts comparably to GPT-4o and Nano Banana.

stories.article_excerpt: At ICLR 2026 in Rio de Janeiro, Apple presented MANZANO, a unified multimodal model that collapses the traditional divide between image un

stories.headline: New Unified Audio Language Model Handles Understanding, Generation, and Reasoning in One System
stories.key_takeaway: NVIDIA and CMU built a single 7B-parameter model that unifies audio understanding, generation, and cross-modal reasoning, matching specialized systems while introducing audio self-reflection.

pull_quote.text: UALM-Reason is a multimodal reasoning model that utilizes both text and audio in the intermediate thinking steps to facilitate complex generation tasks.

stories.article_excerpt: Researchers from NVIDIA and Carnegie Mellon University have introduced UALM, a Unified Audio Language Model that combines audio understanding, te

stories.headline: Florida Attorney General Launches Criminal Investigation Into OpenAI Over FSU Shooting ChatGPT Logs
stories.key_takeaway: Florida AG opened the first-ever state criminal investigation into an AI company, probing whether OpenAI bears criminal responsibility for ChatGPT conversations that allegedly helped the FSU shooter.

pull_quote.text: My prosecutors have looked at this and they have told me, if it was a person on the other end of that screen, we would be charging them with murder.

data_points.label: Time between last query and shooting

stories.headline: Nobel Laureate Geoffrey Hinton Urges UN to Apply Brakes to Runaway AI Development
stories.key_takeaway: Geoffrey Hinton told the UN Digital World Conference that unregulated AI is like a fast car with no steering wheel, calling for strict global regulation before a projected $4.8 trillion market creates irreversible momentum.

pull_quote.text: If you ever went out with a car that had no brake, boy, you are in trouble if you go down a hill. But you are in even more trouble if there is no steering wheel.

data_points.label: UN Member States in AI dialogue

stories.headline: Nineteen New AI Bills Become Law in 2026 as US States Race to Regulate
stories.key_takeaway: US states have enacted 25 AI laws in 2026 with 27 more awaiting signatures, creating a complex compliance patchwork while federal preemption remains absent.

pull_quote.text: States are not waiting for Congress to act. The volume and velocity of bills we are seeing in 2026 is unlike anything in the prior two years.

stories.article_excerpt: The pace of state-level artificial intelligence regulation in the United States has shifted from cautious to urgent. According to tracking

stories.headline: European Financial Regulators Warn AI Is Accelerating Cyberattack Sophistication and Systemic Risk
stories.key_takeaway: European regulators identified five AI features that amplify systemic risk and are converging DORA, the EU AI Act, and prudential regulation to address AI-powered cyber threats.

pull_quote.text: AI errors are difficult to detect, outputs inherit biases from their training data, and there is a tendency towards excessive trust and overreliance on the tools themselves.

data_points.label: EU financial institutions with AI in production
